nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 47. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers between noon and 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 65 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Light Rain
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before midnight, then rain. Cloudy. Low around 38, with temperatures rising to around 44 overnight. North northeast wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and snow before noon, then a slight chance of thunderstorms and rain and snow. Cloudy, with a high near 42. Northeast wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and snow. Cloudy, with a low around 30. Northeast wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Snow before 9am, then snow showers between 9am and noon, then snow showers likely and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 42. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 3 inches possible.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 29.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 41.
